hostname leaf-02
!
interface Ethernet1
   description Uplink to spine-01
   ip address 10.0.1.1/30
   ip access-group ACL-EXTERNAL-IN in
   ip access-group ACL-EXTERNAL-OUT out
   no shutdown
!
interface Ethernet2
   description Downlink to leaf-03
   shutdown
!
ip access-list ACL-EXTERNAL-IN
   10 permit ip any any
   deny ip any any
!
ip access-list ACL-EXTERNAL-OUT
   permit ip any any
!
router bgp 65002
   neighbor 10.0.1.2 remote-as 65001
!
